assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_020",
  "rule_id": "Ensure PAM Enforces Password Requirements - Minimum Uppercase Characters",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.96,
  "rationale": "The finding pertains to password complexity via PAM ucredit setting; remediation is straightforward and does not affect system stability or access.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "low"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Edit /etc/security/pwquality.conf or files in /etc/security/pwquality.conf.d to set a positive ucredit value (e.g., ucredit = 1) to require uppercase characters.",
    "Apply changes and verify with 'pam_pwquality' tests; no service restart or reboot required."
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
